EN_COMMON.timer.label: Time Left:
EN_COMMON.timer.expiredAlert: Time has expired! Generating your results screen.
EN_COMMON.security.defaultReason: Active session tracking policy restricts this assessment to a single authorized tab view concurrently.
EN_COMMON.security.duplicateReason: An active assessment workflow for this email parameter is already running inside an independent tab window context.
EN_COMMON.security.mobileReason: For security compliance and layout integrity, this LQA assessment can only be completed on a desktop or laptop computer. Mobile viewports are restricted.
EN_COMMON.shield.instructionLabel: Bring your cursor back inside the window to reveal the test.
EN_COMMON.qaReset.confirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to reset the QA Session? This will erase all state data.
EN_COMMON.page1.intro: Please provide your identification credentials below. All fields are mandatory.
EN_COMMON.page1.tipAlert: TIP: You have two hours to complete the test. It will submit automatically after that delay. Read carefully and consult the provided documentation layout.
EN_COMMON.page1.alert.missingFields: All identification parameters including Language selection are mandatory.
EN_COMMON.page2.intro: Identify structural or translation bugs from the provided gaming screenshots.
EN_COMMON.page2.q1: 1. Context: The game is Cat-Fu, the devs are from Japan and you are testing in English. Find the issue.
EN_COMMON.page2.q2: 2. Context: The game is LQA Tycoon, the devs are from the United States of America and you are testing in Latin.
EN_COMMON.page3.intro: Review and track translation accuracy with the help of the local documentation matrix.
EN_COMMON.page4.intro: Assess and record writing patterns. Answer utilizing the language specified in the question prompts.
EN_COMMON.page4.q8: 8. What was the last game you enjoyed the most recently? Try to tell us why (150 words).
EN_COMMON.page4.q9.cjkSuffix: (Equivalent of 250 English words (dynamically calculated based on character density))
EN_COMMON.modal.title: Submit Assessment
EN_COMMON.modal.defaultText: You are about to transmit your completed test file. Continue?
EN_COMMON.modal.warningPrefix: WARNING: You have not answered all questions!
EN_COMMON.modal.warningBody: The following input fields are still empty:
EN_COMMON.modal.warningConfirm: Are you sure you want to proceed and finalize transmission?
EN_COMMON.page5.thankYouTitle: Thank you for taking part in our test.
EN_COMMON.page5.thankYouBody: We will contact you shortly. Your compiled assessment logs are rendered below.
EN_COMMON.page5.feedback.heading: Help us improve this assessment
EN_COMMON.page5.feedback.intro: Please share your experience. This form is completely anonymous and detached from your candidate files.
EN_COMMON.page5.feedback.successMessage: Thank you so much for your feedback!
EN_COMMON.page5.feedback.alert.noSelection: Please select at least one issue checkbox or write a comment before submitting.
EN_COMMON.page5.feedback.alert.sendError: Your feedback could not be sent (network or server issue). Please try submitting again.
EN_COMMON.submission.error.message: Submission failed (network or server issue). Your responses are still shown below — please retry, or download them locally in the meantime.

BUG_TYPES.text: Overlap — Text or UI elements visually overlapping.
Truncation — Text cut off or clipped due to insufficient space.
Wrong Language — Text displayed in a language other than the target language.
Untranslated Text — Source (English) text left untranslated.
Mistranslation — Translated text does not match the intended meaning of the source.
Inconsistent Terminology — The same source term translated differently across the build.
Grammar / Spelling Error — Grammatical or orthographic mistakes in the target text.
Placeholder / Variable Error — Broken, missing, or mismatched placeholders/variables (e.g. {0}, [KIT], %s).
Formatting / Line Break Issue — Incorrect line breaks, spacing, or text formatting.
Context Mismatch — Translation is technically correct but inappropriate for the in-game context.
